title: Family-friendly musical magic with Carpe Musicam! Pops Band
description: GEORGE ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Looking for a...
bodyText:
GEORGE ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Looking for a fun way to spark your child's interest in music?

At 15:00 on Sunday 29 June, Laerskool George-Suid hosts the Carpe Musicam!

The Pops Band's Rock, Pop and Romance Concert is a 90-minute performance packed with marches, polkas, film themes, pop hits and romantic melodies, designed to captivate audiences of all ages.


> This vibrant show features a diverse band with members aged 11 to over 70, ranging from near-virtuosos to beginners, each playing custom-crafted parts that create a rich, energetic sound.


Infused with family-friendly humour and educational insights about various instruments, the concert is the perfect way to inspire kids to say, "I want to play that!"

The Pops Band's recent performance in Sedgefield. Photo: Riana Pienaar


> The performance's lively mix of music and edutainment ensures toes will tap and spirits will soar, making it a memorable end to your weekend.


Tickets cost R80 for adults and R20 for scholars, and are available online at www.carpemusicam.co.za or via a WhatsApp to Elsabe on 073 857 2952.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
